subject: Compare preprocessing against time series academic standards
description: Against 10 time series best practices checklist: (1) stationarity testing, (2) autocorrelation analysis (ACF/PACF), (3) seasonality decomposition, (4) lag justification, (5) outlier detection, (6) feature scaling, (7) multicollinearity check, (8) causality (Granger, if applicable), (9) regime change detection, (10) reproducibility. For each, rate: ✅ Done / 🟡 Partial / ❌ Missing. Output: academic_standards_assessment.md
activeForm: Assessing against academic time series standards
